summary.key_theme: Arm 憑藉 AI 授權業務強勁成長與 AGI CPU 策略轉型，持續獲得市場與分析師看好，儘管面臨短期市場輪動帶來的波動。

bullish.title: Arm Holdings Is Expensive, But Not Fully Priced For 2031
bullish.reason: 分析師給予買入評級並設定 544 美元目標價，看好 Armv9 架構與 AI CPU 帶來的長期授權收入成長潛力。

bullish.title: UBS Remains Bullish on Arm Holdings (ARM) – Here’s Why
bullish.reason: 瑞銀 (UBS) 上調 Arm 目標價，肯定其在半導體產業的關鍵地位與持續成長的獲利能力。

bullish.title: Arm Holdings' Licensing Momentum Continues to Fuel Revenue Growth
bullish.reason: 授權收入年增 29%，整體營收成長 20%，顯示 AI 基礎設施需求對公司核心業務的強勁支撐。

bullish.title: Arm Stock Rockets 11%: Why This Massive Tech Rebound Is Shaking Up the AI Sector
bullish.reason: 受科技股整體風險偏好改善與 AI 領域資金回流影響，股價單日大漲 11%。

bullish.title: Why Arm Holdings Stock Soared 224.4% Through The First Half Of 2026
bullish.reason: 回顧上半年表現，公司成功轉型 AI 市場，帶動股價大幅飆升，市場信心穩固。

bearish.title: Why Is Arm Stock Falling on Friday? — Arm Holdings Plc (NASDAQ: ARM) stock declines on Friday due to a market rotation away from AI hardware leaders
bearish.reason: 受市場資金輪動影響，投資人從 AI 硬體龍頭股獲利了結，導致股價短期回調。

bearish.title: Arm Holdings: Dangerous AI Game
bearish.reason: 分析師對公司進入 AI 晶片設計市場的策略持審慎態度，認為存在執行風險與競爭壓力。

bearish.title: What's Going on With Arm Holdings Stock Tuesday?
bearish.reason: 隨科技股整體賣壓，股價盤前下跌 4%，屬於市場情緒波動。

neutral.title: Arm Announces Earnings Release Date for First Quarter Fiscal Year Ended 2027
neutral.reason: 僅為例行性財報發布日期公告，對股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: What's Going on With Arm Holdings Stock Monday?
neutral.reason: 股價隨大盤技術性反彈 5%，無特定公司基本面消息。
